name: SBS Drama Awards
overview: The hottest actors, producers, and writers gather together to celebrate the end of the year at the 2017 SBS Drama Awards. In 2017, there were many dramas that captured the heart of the viewers. What will be the show that has been loved the most by viewers? And who will be the best actor of 2017?

trailers.title: Female Excellence Award goes to Kim You Jung [2020 SBS Drama Awards]
